title: Mission to Mandalore (Zann Consortium)

Around [[1 BBY/Legends|1 BBY]], [[Zann Consortium/Legends|Zann Consortium]] forces, led by [[Tyber Zann]], decided to '''kidnap''' the [[Supreme Strategist]] from above [[Mandalore/Legends|Mandalore]] in an act of [[Pirate/Legends|piracy]]. Hiding in an [[Asteroid/Legends|asteroid]] field above the planet, the Consortium fighters destroyed the Mandalorian [[Alpha-3 Nimbus-class V-wing starfighter/Legends|V-wings]] waiting there. Once the Supreme Strategist arrived in a [[Venator-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Venator''-class Star Destroyer]], the Consortium vessels destroyed its escort and boarded the ship, capturing the strategist.

==Behind the scenes==
Unused text lines in the game files indicated that the tutorial of ''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' was intended to take place in [[5 BBY/Legends|5 BBY]].<ref name="5BBY">''[[Star Wars: Empire at War: Forces of Corruption]]'' — MasterTextFile_ENGLISH.dat; TEXT_UNDERWORLD_PROLOGUE_TITLE: "Five years before the Battle of Yavin..."</ref>
